❌ 无效的协议类型，请使用 T (TCP) 或 U (UDP): ❌ Invalid protocol type. Use T (TCP) or U (UDP)
❌ 无效的目标地址，请输入有效的 IP 地址或域名: ❌ Invalid target address. Please enter a valid IP address or domain
❌ 未找到 nexttrace 命令，请先安装 nexttrace: ❌ nexttrace command not found, please install nexttrace first
❌ 端口号必须在 1-65535 之间: ❌ Port number must be between 1 and 65535
用法: /trace <目标地址> [T/U] [端口]\nT = TCP, U:
Usage: /trace <target> [T/U] [port]
T = TCP, U = UDP, ICMP is used if omitted
Example: /trace 1.1.1.1
      /trace example.com T 443
